_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Kandha kanca, banjur mlebu.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan dibangun kanggo mbukak saben basa. Saben basa duwe siji hadiah terjemahan.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Daftar basa lan tarif Marks sementara. Marks token partisipasi, dudu ekuitas.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Terjemahake Liana Banyan menyang {{language}}. Entuk {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Saben istilah ana alasane. Asal-usul 26 jeneng sing paling penting.
speakFriend.step1Body: Bukak Hadiah Terjemahan saka papan Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Terjemahake kabeh string sing dibutuhake. Kirima liwat alur Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Sawise ditampa, kowe entuk Marks lan dicathet ing IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Kandha kanca, banjur mlebu."

languageSwitcher.tip: Gunakake sandi basa beda-beda ing Gapura Durin kanggo mbukak pengalaman unik!
